prose:
**TEMPO frontier-orbital gap (DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP)** — Doublet radical (charge 0, multiplicity 2) in gas phase on the input geometry. DFT single-point with tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF. SCF converged in 12 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV** (Koopmans vertical orbital gap). HOMO energy: −6.3375439 eV. LUMO energy: −2.4651235 eV. Total electronic energy: −13167.145 eV (−483.88366 Hartree). Frontier orbital energies and related Koopmans-derived properties (vertical IP 6.338 eV, vertical EA 2.465 eV, electronegativity 4.401 eV, hardness 1.936 eV, electrophilicity 5.002 eV) reported. No warnings. Integrity trustworthy.</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">29
